wikipediaRefs.title: Nvidia
wikipediaRefs.snippet: Nvidia is an American technology company; headquarters in Santa Clara, California; founded 1993; key people include Jensen Huang (president and CEO).

wikipediaRefs.title: Jensen Huang
wikipediaRefs.snippet: Jensen Huang is the founder, president, and CEO of Nvidia; he has remained president and CEO since its founding.

wikipediaRefs.title: Anthropic
wikipediaRefs.snippet: Anthropic is an American AI company founded in 2021; Dario Amodei is CEO and the company focuses on AI safety. It refused a DoD demand in 2026 tied to domestic surveillance and fully autonomous weapons.
